channel.title: barefoot___wanderer
channel.description: DIY 🪚 Building my own container house ⚒️ Owner Builder Learning as I go 💪

item.title: My barefootstore is officially open! ❤️ Barefootstore.com.au...
item.description:
My barefootstore is officially open! ❤️ Barefootstore.com.au I’ve been working so hard behind the scenes to make these guides for you and I’m so excited to finally share them with you! If you are part of my barefoot inner circle on either Patreon or YouTube there’s a discount code live for you on those platforms ✨ You can also find the link on my page in my bio in my linktree, I can’t wait to hear what you think of the guides and please let me know if there’s anything else you would like to see in my online store 🥰
FULL POST | EMBED | REVERSED
